message:
feat(workflows/engine): Cx-first entry points for WorkflowEngine (ft-xbnl0.2.2)

Add Cx-threaded variants for all six WorkflowEngine public async
methods so storage-backed workflow operations honor the caller's
capability context at their entry and exit boundaries. Unlike the
retry / wait / telemetry slices where the Cx-first pattern binds
sleeps or timeouts to virtual time, workflows/engine.rs has no
timing primitives — the Cx-first value here is checkpoint-based
cancellation visibility around storage writes.

New Cx-first API (asupersync-runtime only):
- WorkflowEngine::start_cx
- WorkflowEngine::start_with_id_cx
- WorkflowEngine::resume_cx
- WorkflowEngine::find_incomplete_cx
- WorkflowEngine::update_status_cx
- WorkflowEngine::log_step_cx

Each _cx variant calls cx.checkpoint() before the storage call and
again after it, mapping any cancellation to Error::Runtime. A canceled
caller pre-checkpoint skips the storage write entirely; a late-
canceled caller post-checkpoint abandons the returned value before it
propagates into the wider call graph. start_cx further delegates to
start_with_id_cx so the checkpoint plumbing is exercised end to end.

Non-Cx entry points are untouched and remain valid for call sites
that have not yet threaded a Cx through; this is an additive
refactor.

New deterministic test:
- find_incomplete_cx_returns_empty_for_fresh_db_ft_xbnl0_2_2: opens a
  fresh tempfile storage, calls find_incomplete_cx, asserts the empty
  result. Not a LabRuntime test because workflows/engine.rs has no
  sleep/timeout seams to bind to virtual time; the pattern here is
  boundary checkpoints which are validated through the real storage
  path.

Eleventh file in the ft-xbnl0.2.2 Cx-first lane. Remaining: 4 files
(runtime.rs owned by wa-1m7nk; search_bridge.rs owned by CC-2;
workflows/runner.rs 2439 LOC; workflows/mod.rs 11568 LOC).

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc1-target):
- cargo test --lib --no-default-features --features native-wezterm
  workflows::engine::tests::find_incomplete_cx_returns_empty_for_fresh_db_ft_xbnl0_2_2: pass
- cargo clippy --lib --no-default-features --features native-wezterm
  -- -D warnings: clean
- cargo check --lib (default features): pass
- scripts/check_no_runtime_regression.sh: ft-xbnl0.2.6 gate passes
- rustfmt --edition 2024 --check: clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
